Question: Write each system of linear equations as an augmented matrix: ⓐ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}3 x + 8 y = -3 \\ 2 x = -5 y - 3\end{matrix}\right .$$ ⓑ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x - 5 y + 3 z = 8 \\ 3 x - y + 4 z = 7 \\ x + 3 y + 2 z = -3\end{matrix}\right .$$

Write each system of linear equations as an augmented matrix: ⓐ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}11 x = -9 y - 5 \\ 7 x + 5 y = -1\end{matrix}\right .$$ ⓑ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}5 x - 3 y + 2 z = -5 \\ 2 x - y - z = 4 \\ 3 x - 2 y + 2 z = -7\end{matrix}\right .$$

Write the system of equations that corresponds to the augmented matrix: $$\left [\begin{matrix}1 &  &  & -1 &  &  & 2 &  &  & 3 \\ 2 &  &  & 1 &  &  & -2 &  &  & 1 \\ 4 &  &  & -1 &  &  & 2 &  &  & 0\end{matrix}\right ] .$$
Answer: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}\text{} x - y + 2 z = 3 \\ 2 x + y - 2 z = 1 \\ \text{} 4 x - y + 2 z = 0\end{matrix}\right .$$

Question: Write the system of equations that corresponds to the augmented matrix: $$\left [\begin{matrix}1 &  &  & 1 &  &  & 1 &  &  & 4 \\ 2 &  &  & 3 &  &  & -1 &  &  & 8 \\ 1 &  &  & 1 &  &  & -1 &  &  & 3\end{matrix}\right ] .$$
Answer: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}\text{} x + y + z = 4 \\ 2 x + 3 y - z = 8 \\ x + y - z = 3\end{matrix}\right .$$

Question: Perform the indicated operations sequentially on the augmented matrix: ⓐ Interchange rows 1 and 3. ⓑ Multiply row 3 by 3. ⓒ Multiply row 3 by 2 and add to row 2. $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaaaaaaa}5 &  &  & -2 &  &  & -2 &  &  \\ 4 &  &  & -1 &  &  & -4 &  &  \\ -2 &  &  & 3 &  &  & 0 &  & \end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{aaa} &  & -2 \\  &  & 4 \\  &  & -1\end{matrix}\right . ]$$

Perform the indicated operations on the augmented matrix: ⓐ Interchange rows 1 and 2, ⓑ Multiply row 1 by 2, ⓒ Multiply row 2 by 3 and add to row 1. $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaaaaaaa}2 &  &  & -3 &  &  & -2 &  &  \\ 4 &  &  & 1 &  &  & -3 &  &  \\ 5 &  &  & 0 &  &  & 4 &  & \end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{aaa} &  & -4 \\  &  & 2 \\  &  & -1\end{matrix}\right . ]$$

Perform the needed row operation that will get the first entry in row 2 to be zero in the augmented matrix: $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaaaa}1 &  &  & -1 &  &  \\ 3 &  &  & -6 &  & \end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{aaa} &  & 2 \\  &  & 2\end{matrix}\right . ] .$$

Perform the needed row operation that will get the first entry in row 2 to be zero in the augmented matrix: $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaaaa}1 &  &  & -1 &  &  \\ -2 &  &  & -3 &  & \end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{aaa} &  & 3 \\  &  & 2\end{matrix}\right . ] .$$
Solve the system of equations using a matrix: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x + y = 7 \\ x - 2 y = 6\end{matrix}\right . .$$
Solve the system of equations using a matrix: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x + y = -4 \\ x - y = -2\end{matrix}\right . .$$
Solve the system of equations using a matrix: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x - 5 y + 3 z = 8 \\ 3 x - y + 4 z = 7 \\ x + 3 y + 2 z = -3\end{matrix}\right . .$$
Solve the system of equations using a matrix: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}-3 x + y + z = -4 \\ \text{unicode[:-]} x + 2 y - 2 z = 1 \\ 2 x - y - z = -1\end{matrix}\right . .$$
Solve the system of equations using a matrix: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x - 2 y + 2 z = 1 \\ -2 x + y - z = 2 \\ x - y + z = 5\end{matrix}\right . .$$
Solve the system of equations using a matrix: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}3 x + 4 y - 3 z = -2 \\ 2 x + 3 y - z = -12 \\ x + y - 2 z = 6\end{matrix}\right . .$$
Solve the system of equations using a matrix: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x + y - z = 0 \\ 2 x + 4 y - 2 z = 6 \\ 3 x + 6 y - 3 z = 9\end{matrix}\right . .$$
Answer: infinitely many solutions $$( x , y , z ) \text{,}$$ where $$x = z - 3 ; y = 3 ; z$$ is any real number.

Question: Solve the system of equations using a matrix: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x - y - z = 1 \\ \text{unicode[:-]} x + 2 y - 3 z = -4 \\ 3 x - 2 y - 7 z = 0\end{matrix}\right . .$$
Answer: infinitely many solutions $$( x , y , z ) \text{,}$$ where $$x = 5 z - 2 ; y = 4 z - 3 ; z$$ is any real number.
